Magento - Escape HTML.description: Escape a string for safe HTML output

Magento - Escape URL.description: Escape a string for safe use in URLs

Magento - Escape HTML Attr.description: Escape a string for safe use in HTML attributes

Magento - Escape JS.description: Escape a string for safe inline JavaScript output

Magento - Translate.description: Wrap a string in Magento's translation function

Magento - Get URL.description: Generate a store URL from a route path

Magento - Get Child HTML.description: Render a child block by name

Magento - Get Data.description: Get a data value from the current block

Magento - File Header.description: Standard phtml file header with declare strict, common use statements and @var annotations

Magento - Module Registration.description: Module registration.php for registering a Magento 2 module

Magento - Argument Class.description: Base class implementing ArgumentInterface for use as a block argument ViewModel

Hyvä - File Header.description: Standard phtml file header with declare strict, common use statements and @var annotations

Hyvä - SVG Icon.description: Render a custom SVG icon by name via the svgicons ViewModel

Hyvä - SVG Lucide Icon.description: Render a Lucide SVG icon via the lucideIcons ViewModel

Hyvä - View Model.description: Require a ViewModel from the ViewModelRegistry with a @var type hint

Hyvä - Dispatch Message.description: Show a UI message via Hyvä's dispatchMessages. Duration 0 means persistent until dismissed

Hyvä - Private Content Loaded.description: Listen for Hyvä's private-content-loaded event to access customer section data

Hyvä - Reload Customer Section.description: Dispatch an event to force a reload of all customer section data

Hyvä - Format Price.description: Format a number as a store price string including currency symbol

Hyvä - Script Tag.description: Inline script block with an Alpine component function and alpine:init registration
